name: Old Fashioned Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Stir in flour, 1 tsp salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. Gradually add milk and cook on medium heat until thickened.
4. Add onions, potatoes, and water to the saucepan.
5. Cook over high heat until steaming, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Drain excess liquid if needed.
7. Arrange 1/3 of the potato-onion mixture in a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
8. Sprinkle with parsley and pour sauce over the potatoes and onions.
9. Repeat layers two more times.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 45 to 60 minutes or until tender and brown.
Makes 6 servings.
